overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing a player transitioning from a first-person vehicle cockpit to third-person perspective, exiting onto an alien planet surface, and running along a rocky coastal ridge toward a crashed spaceship. The environment features a green-tinted atmosphere, barren rocky terrain, and an ocean visible along the cliffside.

agents.ego_description: seated in spacecraft cockpit viewing the holographic HUD interface

entered.detail: futuristic holographic interface with orange and blue displays showing navigation data
illuminated buttons and screens lining the cockpit interior

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a first-person view from inside a spacecraft cockpit, showing a detailed HUD interface with various holographic displays and control panels in a dimly lit, enclosed interior.

events.description: camera switches from first-person cockpit to third-person external view behind the vehicle
character initiates exit animation from the spacecraft rear hatch

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the spacecraft rear hatch onto the gravel surface in an orange and white spacesuit

entered.detail: dark spacecraft with open rear ramp and glowing interior lights
gray gravel and rock surface of the alien planet

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person behind the spacecraft as the character climbs out onto the barren rocky terrain under a greenish alien sky, transitioning from the enclosed cockpit to the open environment.

events.description: character begins running along the coastal ridge away from the landing zone
ocean becomes visible to the right as character ascends the ridge crest

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the narrow rocky ridge with the ocean visible on the right side and mountains in the distance

entered.detail: dark green alien ocean with gentle waves visible below the ridge
large rock formations and outcroppings jutting from the water
hazy mountains lining the distant coastline under the green sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow rocky ridge overlooking a vast green ocean, with misty mountains visible in the distance. The terrain is barren with scattered rocks and steep drops to the water below, while the spacecraft disappears behind.

events.description: crashed spaceship wreckage comes into view ahead on the ridge
character slows and maneuvers around the crashed ship wreckage

agents.ego_description: approaching and carefully moving past the crashed spaceship, examining the wreckage while continuing along the coast

entered.detail: large derelict spacecraft with twin vertical stabilizers lying on its side
scattered wreckage and components strewn around the crash site

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large crashed spaceship lying on its side along the ridge, carefully moving past the wreckage with scattered debris visible around the crash site. The ocean remains visible in the background as the character continues past the derelict vessel toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from the claustrophobic interior of a spacecraft to a vast, desolate alien coastline. It begins within the dimly lit cockpit, focusing on a detailed HUD and holographic control panels before the perspective shifts outward as the character climbs onto the barren rocky terrain. As the enclosed space gives way to an open environment under a greenish sky, the camera follows the character running along a narrow ridge overlooking a vast green ocean and misty distant mountains. The scene then expands across the rocky cliffside, moving past the wreckage of a large crashed spaceship lying on its side amidst scattered debris. Finally, the camera continues past the derelict vessel, keeping the ocean in view while heading toward the far-off mountains.
